question: According to the area chart of revenue by year, which statement is supported by the data shown?

options.A: The last two years have the same revenue.
options.B: Revenue in the first year was the lowest.
options.D: Revenue in the first year was the highest.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
